headline: MSCI to Host Q&A Session on Private Assets and AI-Enabled Innovation on June 25, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, June 22, 2026--MSCI Inc. ("MSCI" or the "Company") (NYSE: MSCI) will host a Q&A webinar to provide updates on MSCI’s Private Assets business, including strategic priorities, recent product innovation and AI-enabled capabilities. The webinar will include Luke Flemmer, Head of Private Assets and Jeremy Ulan, Head of Investor Relations and Treasurer, and will be moderated by Alex Kramm, Managing Director and Senior Equity Research Analyst at UBS.

headline: MSCI Gave SpaceX an ESG Score Matching Wartime Russia
summary: SpaceX drew MSCI's lowest possible ESG rating one day before its $75 billion IPO, the same grade MSCI gave Russia.

raw.headline: MSCI Gave SpaceX an ESG Score Matching Wartime Russia
raw.summary: SpaceX drew MSCI's lowest possible ESG rating one day before its $75 billion IPO, the same grade MSCI gave Russia.

headline: SpaceX stock falls after MSCI gives lowest ESG rating
summary: MSCI assigned SpaceX a CCC rating, placing it in the same tier as Russia after its 2022 invasion of Ukraine

raw.headline: SpaceX stock falls after MSCI gives lowest ESG rating

headline: As public sentiment sours, Indonesia awaits MSCI verdict which risks $13 billion in capital outflows
summary: Indonesia's market is now one of the world’s worst-performing, with the Jakarta Composite Index falling over 28% in 2026 thus far.

raw.headline: As public sentiment sours, Indonesia awaits MSCI verdict which risks $13 billion in capital outflows

headline: SPCX Stock Slides Overnight: Musk Says ‘Electric Rockets Are Impossible’ After MSCI Slaps SpaceX With Lowest ESG Rating
summary: The dispute echoes 2022, when Musk called ESG "a scam" after Tesla was removed from the S&P 500 ESG Index.
